title: SUMMER CAMPS - 211info
text: OREGON MUSEUM OF SCIENCE AND INDUSTRY SUMMER CAMPS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers day classes in the Portland Metro area, overnight camps at the coast and in the desert, and backpacking trips in the Wallowas and Three Sisters Wilderness. Also offers Family Camps over Memorial and Labor Day weekends. Camps and classes vary in length, from 4 – 12 days. 1945 SE Water Avenue Portland, OR 97214 Eligibility: Varies by course or camp Hours: Varies by course or camp Email (503) 797-4000 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 797-4000 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: See website FEES: Varies by camp from $550 to $2,260. Cost is dependent on the type and duration of camp. Exact pricing for each camp is available on the OMSI e-commerce website, at the following link: https://secure.omsi.edu/camps-and-classes. DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: State of Oregon TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: The OMSI/SE Water Avenue Station connects with TriMet bus and MAX light rail, and Portland Streetcar lines Services: Camps General Recreational Activities/Sports Outdoor Environmental Education Youth Enrichment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: ARTS AND CULTURE - OREGON MUSEUM OF SCIENCE AND INDUSTRY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON MUSEUM OF SCIENCE AND INDUSTRY
